command: for f in .github/workflows/*.yml .github/workflows/*.yaml; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then basename "$f"; fi; done
reason: list workflow yml files by iterating glob

command: for d in packages/*/; do echo "$d"; done
reason: list packages directories via glob iteration

command: for f in packages/*/vite.config.* packages/*/*/vite.config.* packages/*/*/*/vite.config.* sdks/*/vite.config.* sdks/*/esbuild.*; do if [ -f "$f" ]; then echo "$f"; fi; done
reason: find all vite config and esbuild config files

command: for pkg in packages/enterprise packages/console/core packages/console/app packages/stats/core; do echo "=== $pkg ==="; ls "$pkg"/src/*.test.* "$pkg"/src/**/*.test.* "$pkg"/test/* "$pkg"/__tests__/* 2>
reason: find test files in orphaned packages
